title: Amplified Nether Kill
description: Kills the player above Y=255 in the Nether. This is useful for if you're using Amplified Nether and don't want people to get stranded above the roof.
body: This works great with the [Amplified Nether](https://modrinth.com/datapack/amplified-nether) datapack. It's really easy to get on top of the nether roof, however, because Amplified Nether extends the Nether roof to build limit, it's impossible to get down from the Nether roof when Amplified Nether is installed. This datapack fixes that by killing the player if they're above the Nether roof.
